task_description: Create the Synergy Workflow Wizard as a new tab in ANVIL-CLIENT with bundled connector data, scoring algorithm, pipeline cards, tier filter, and live-update debounce.

verification.summary: typecheck and lint both pass cleanly. Review findings addressed: dead code removed, scoring normalization fixed, stage assignment tightened, dead connectors stripped from bundle.

issues_fixed: MCP Context stage now only includes connectors with no routing keywords (was: 195/200, now: only genuinely unclassified connectors)
topCategory for mcpContext filters out routing keywords before selecting domain category
Score normalization uses Math.max(matchedCount, 1) + 3 as denominator instead of goalTokens.length + 3
Removed 34 dead connectors from bundle (saved ~524 lines)
review_fixes_applied.notes: All 166 remaining connectors have at least one routing keyword (trigger/action/llm/ai/ml), so mcpContext stage will be empty with current dataset. This is correct behavior per the fix specification - mcpContext is reserved for connectors that do not fit other stages.
